assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: Response clearly identifies 2 dev clusters on Rapid channel and 2 prod clusters on Stable channel throughout the checklists, with specific items for each environment

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions mandatory resource requests for Autopilot, notes GKE manages node upgrades automatically, and includes Autopilot-specific considerations section

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist includes checking for deprecated API usage and warnings, with specific kubectl command in post-upgrade section

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'All containers have resource requests (mandatory for Autopilot)' in workload readiness section

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist includes PDB configuration, no bare pods requirement, and terminationGracePeriodSeconds limits

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: Post-upgrade checklist includes specific gcloud commands to verify control plane version for both prod clusters

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Post-upgrade checklist has comprehensive workload health section with kubectl commands for deployments, pods, statefulsets, and services

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends using dev clusters as staging environment and validating for 2+ weeks before prod upgrade

assertions.expectation: Mentions that checking the GKE release schedule gives ~1 month best-case advance notice for new minor upgrades, beyond the 72h notification
assertions.reason: Response mentions 72h advance warning but does not discuss the ~1 month advance notice available from checking GKE release schedules
Post-upgrade checklist includes dedicated 'Observability' section with monitoring metrics, logs, error rates, and API latency validation

assertions.expectation: Does NOT proactively recommend node-level maintenance exclusions for Autopilot unless the customer explicitly asks for node upgrade control
assertions.reason: Response only mentions maintenance exclusions for control plane upgrades and notes that node upgrades are automatically managed by GKE in Autopilot
